summary: Iteration 103 - Leads Page + Lead Detail Modal Full Rebuild. All 20 features tested and verified working. Fixed Escape key modal close functionality by properly implementing useModalA11y hook.
critical_code_review_comments: LeadsListView.tsx correctly implements stats strip with 4 metrics (Total Inquiries, Pipeline value, Needs attention, Avg value)
Tab row correctly shows 6 pill-style tabs (All, Needs action, Inquiry, Discovery, Quoted, Booked) with count badges
Lead rows correctly display client name, project type, key date, value, and status badge
Hover quick-actions (Send Quote, Call, More) appear correctly on row hover
LeadDetailModal.tsx correctly implements split-panel layout with status-colored gradient header
Modal header shows avatar with initials, client name, project title, service type, time ago, and value chip
Action row has Send Quote/Schedule call/Email/Archive buttons working correctly
Modal tabs (Overview/Quotes/Contracts/Notes/Activity/Files/Messages/Deliverables) with underline style working
Overview tab split-panel layout (left: client details + discovery call + notes, right: relationship timeline) working
Discovery call 3-step vertical timeline renders correctly
FIX APPLIED: Added useModalA11y hook call and ref attachment to enable Escape key modal close
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data (5 leads)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 103 complete. LeadsListView and LeadDetailModal fully working. Key test IDs: leads-list-view, leads-stats-strip, leads-tab-row, leads-tab-{all|needs_action|inquiry|discovery|quoted|signed}, leads-list-table, lead-row-{id}, quick-actions-{id}, lead-detail-modal, lead-avatar, lead-value-chip, modal-action-row, modal-primary-action, modal-schedule-call, modal-email-action, modal-archive-action, tab-{overview|quotes|contracts|notes|activity|files|messages|deliverables}, overview-split-panel, client-details-section, discovery-call-section, overview-notes-section, relationship-timeline. Industry language correctly applied (Photography: Inquiries, Quote, Booking Agreement, Shoot date).

Stats_Strip_4_Metrics.details: Stats strip shows Total Inquiries (5), Pipeline value ($16.2k), Needs attention (0), Avg value ($3.2k)

Tab_Row_6_Tabs.details: Pill-style tabs: All (5), Needs action, Inquiry (1), Discovery (2), Quoted (2), Booked

Tab_Count_Badges.details: Count badges correctly show numbers for each tab

Lead_Rows_Display.details: Lead rows show client name, project type, key date, value, and status badge

Hover_Quick_Actions.details: Quick actions (Send Quote, Call, More) appear on row hover

Lead_Row_Click_Opens_Modal.details: Clicking lead row opens Lead Detail Modal

Tab_Filtering.details: Clicking Inquiry tab filters to 1 row, All tab shows all 5 rows

Modal_Status_Gradient_Header.details: Modal opens with status-colored gradient header (amber for inquiry/reviewing)

Modal_Header_Elements.details: Header shows avatar (EW), client name, project title, service type, time ago, value chip ($1,800)

Modal_Action_Row.details: Action row has Send Quote, Schedule call, Email, Archive buttons

Modal_Tabs_Underline_Style.details: 8 tabs found: overview, quotes, contracts, notes, activity, files, messages, deliverables

Overview_Split_Panel.details: Split-panel layout with left panel (client details, discovery call, notes) and right panel (timeline)

Client_Details_Section.details: Client details section shows industry-specific fields (Email, Project type, Source)

Discovery_Call_Timeline.details: 3-step vertical timeline (Schedule, Complete, Send quote) renders correctly

Relationship_Timeline.details: Right panel shows activity events with colored dots

Notes_Tab.details: Notes tab shows note input and save button

Escape_Key_Close.details: Escape key closes modal (FIXED by adding useModalA11y hook)

fix_applied.issue: Escape key did not close Lead Detail Modal
fix_applied.root_cause: useModalA11y hook was imported but not called/used in LeadDetailModal component
fix_applied.fix: Added modalRef = useModalA11y(true, onClose) call and attached ref={modalRef} to modal div
